records.title: checkout button on the cart page navigates to Checkout: Your Information
records.acText: On /cart.html with at least one item, the Checkout button is displayed; clicking it routes standard_user to /checkout-step-one.html (page title 'Checkout: Your Information').

records.title: mandatory fields show their placeholder text
records.acText: On /checkout-step-one.html, the three mandatory inputs display placeholder text 'First Name', 'Last Name', and 'Zip/Postal Code' respectively.

records.title: valid information routes to Checkout: Overview
records.acText: On /checkout-step-one.html, filling First Name 'John', Last Name 'Doe', Zip/Postal Code '12345' and clicking Continue routes standard_user to /checkout-step-two.html (page title 'Checkout: Overview').

records.title: continue with all fields empty shows "Error: First Name is required" and flags all fields
records.acText: On /checkout-step-one.html, clicking Continue with all three fields empty shows the error banner 'Error: First Name is required' and flags all three inputs with the error state (error class + error icon).

records.title: continue with only first name shows "Error: Last Name is required" and flags all fields
records.acText: On /checkout-step-one.html, with only First Name ('John') populated, clicking Continue shows 'Error: Last Name is required' and flags all three inputs with the error state.

records.title: continue with only last name shows "Error: First Name is required" and flags all fields
records.acText: On /checkout-step-one.html, with only Last Name ('Doe') populated, clicking Continue shows 'Error: First Name is required' and flags all three inputs with the error state.

records.title: continue with only postal code shows "Error: First Name is required" and flags all fields
records.acText: On /checkout-step-one.html, with only Zip/Postal Code ('12345') populated, clicking Continue shows 'Error: First Name is required' and flags all three inputs with the error state.

records.title: dismissing the error clears the banner and field styling but keeps entered values
records.acText: On /checkout-step-one.html with an error shown, clicking the error container's X removes the error banner and clears the per-field error styling on all three inputs, while preserving any text already entered (First Name 'John' is retained).

records.title: Cancel button and cart icon are visible on the Checkout: Your Information page
records.acText: On /checkout-step-one.html, standard_user sees the Cancel button and the header shopping-cart icon both displayed.

records.title: Cancel button returns to the Cart page from Checkout: Your Information
records.acText: On /checkout-step-one.html, clicking Cancel returns standard_user to the Cart page (/cart.html, title 'Your Cart').

records.title: cart icon returns to the Cart page from Checkout: Your Information
records.acText: On /checkout-step-one.html, clicking the header shopping-cart icon returns standard_user to the Cart page (/cart.html, title 'Your Cart').

records.title: entered information does not persist after leaving via Cancel and returning
records.acText: After entering First name 'Jane', Last name 'Doe', Postal code '12345' on /checkout-step-one.html, leaving to the cart via Cancel, and returning to the page, all three fields are empty (form state is not persisted).

records.title: cancelling an empty form returns to the Cart page without a validation error
records.acText: With the form empty on /checkout-step-one.html, clicking Cancel returns standard_user to the Cart page (/cart.html, title 'Your Cart') with no validation error shown.
